name: testRefundButtonVisibility
description: Refund button is visible only for transactions with status 'SUCCESS'
descriptionHtml: Refund button is visible only for transactions with status 'SUCCESS'

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0808.125444.23.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Refund button is visible only for transactions with status 'SUCCESS'

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' in the Header
Set start and end date: 05-08-2025 to 05-08-2025
Set start and end date: 05-08-2025 to 05-08-2025
Select 'CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' company using filter
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Select Rows Per Page '100'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Click pagination page button #1
Click next page button
Select Rows Per Page '100'
Click the 'Rows Per Page' dropdown Chevron
Click pagination page button #1
Click next page button
